details.redacted_summary: # 2026-05-19 ## /model 行为结论（用户要求后续按此口径回答） - /model 的效果取决于当前 agent 是否被单独设置过默认模型。 - A 类：agent 未被单独设过模型 - /model 切换通常会持久生效，新对话/重启后仍保持。 - 实际上相当于改了公共默认，会影响其他同样未单独设模型的 agent。 - 未单独设模型的子 agent 会跟着变；单独设过的不会。 - B 类：agent 被单独设过默认模型（pm/coder/designer 等命名 agent 多半属于此类） - /model 只对当前会话临时生效。 - 即使提示“已更新默认模型”也可能无效；应以 /status 为准。 - 开新对话、agent 重启、或派子 agent 干活后，会回到该 agent 自己配置的默认模型。 - 当前没有持久化办法，只能每次新对话重新 /model，直到后续产品改进上线。 - 两类通用补充 - 回复风格突然变化，常见原因是子 agent 在工作；子 agent 独立且可能使用自己的默认模型。 - 确认当前真实模型应使用 /status，不要靠自然语言问 agent “你是什么模型”。 - /status 只能看当前会话，不能看到刚才某个子 agent 用了什么模型。 - 已规划改进方向

triage.rationale: The redacted summary contains general operational notes about agent model-switching behavior and planned improvements, without user secrets, credentials, personal data, or sensitive business content. Team-channel origin still implies review-only release policy.
suggested_redactions: Remove or generalize source identifiers, hashes, and internal URI references before sharing beyond review context.
Avoid naming specific team channels or workspace-specific agent identifiers if externally released.
triage.release_summary: Model-switching behavior depends on whether the active agent has its own configured default model. For agents without a separate default, a model switch may persist and affect other similarly configured agents; for agents with their own default, the switch is typically session-scoped even if the interface suggests otherwise. The reliable verification signal is the status command for the current session, not asking the agent to identify its model in natural language.
triage.reusable_lesson: After changing models, verify the active session with the status command and expect separately configured agents or sub-agents to retain their own defaults.
triage.residual_risk: Behavior may change after future product updates.
